fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> describes how the R, G, B, and A components of a Vulkan image are mapped during YCbCr color conversion. Each property specifies a component index used by the Vulkan sampler conversion.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0,
    G = 1,
    B = 2,
    A = 3
};
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies the Vulkan component swizzle mapping used in a YCbCr color conversion.

fields.value: The component index for the alpha channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the component index mapped to the alpha channel.

fields.value: The component index for the blue channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the component index mapped to the blue channel.
